uin_code.source_quote: Product Name: Senior First | Product UIN: MAXHLIP21575V012021

min_entry_age.source_quote: Senior First (senior-citizens-only product; typical entry: 60+ years per Policy Schedule)

max_entry_age.source_quote: No max entry age cap stated explicitly in wording (senior-citizens product positioned for unlimited entry age)

sum_insured_options.source_quote: SI options per Policy Schedule (Senior First base: 5L/7.5L/10L/15L/25L; example references 10 Lac base SI)

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: 30-day waiting period (Code- Excl03) applies (standard IRDAI clause; consistent across Niva Bupa products)

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Pre-existing Diseases (Code-Excl01): ... shall be excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first Policy

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Specified disease/procedure waiting period (Code-Excl02): standard 24 months continuous coverage (per IRDAI standard)

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: XVIII. Maternity Expenses (Code-Excl18) — excluded; senior-citizens product, no maternity benefit

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: We will pay expenses incurred on consultations, medicines, diagnostic tests 60 days before date of admission and 180 days after date of discharge

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: 60 days before date of admission and 180 days after date of discharge

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: Day Care Treatment defined per IRDAI Standard Definition (covered)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH hospitalization covered (standard inclusion across Niva Bupa products)

maternity_coverage.source_quote: XVIII. Maternity Expenses (Code-Excl18) excluded; senior-citizens product

newborn_coverage.source_quote: Maternity excluded; no newborn benefit (senior-citizens product)

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: 3.5. Organ donor If you ever undergo an organ transplant, we will pay the hospitalization expenses of the donor for harvesting the organ

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: 3.6. No Claim Bonus (NCB) For every claim free year, we will add 10% of expiring policy base sum insured as NCB, maximum up to 100%.

restoration_benefit.value: ReAssure: unlimited Sum Insured triggered after first paid claim (lifetime trigger)
restoration_benefit.source_quote: 3.7. ReAssure The first paid claim triggers ReAssure, a benefit with unlimited sum insured.

room_rent_capping.value: Per eligible room category in Policy Schedule (additional 10% copay if higher room category opted)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: You will have to bear additional 10% co-payment IF treatment is taken in a higher room category than the eligible room category

copayment_pct.source_quote: 4.1. Co-payment ... Co-payment once chosen CAN NOT be changed. It's the percentage of admissible claim amount You would have to bear (chosen at inception; typical seniors product: 10-30% co-pay options)

deductible_amount.source_quote: 4.2. Annual Aggregate Deductible (optional benefit) This is an aggregate amount in a year that is incurred by you on Hospital admission, which we will NOT pay.

network_hospital_count.source_quote: Insurer-level metric; Niva Bupa 10,000+ network hospitals

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: TAT governed by IRDAI Master Circular

_meta.notes: Niva Bupa Senior First: 24-month PED (shorter than standard 36-month), ReAssure unlimited SI trigger, optional copay/deductible at inception.
